title: sorbus scandiaca
intro: Sorbus scandiaca, also known as the Rowan or Mountain Ash, is a deciduous shrub native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. The plant is rich in medicinal properties, primarily due to its high concentration of anthocyanins, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which exhibit antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Sorbus scandiaca include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support immune function, as well as its traditional use in treating digestive issues and fever. Traditionally, the plant is prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used in folk medicine to promote overall well-being and alleviate symptoms of various health conditions.
